name: Sunday Tomatoes Sauteed with Chipolte
recipeIngredient: 1 dried chipotle pepper, stemmed and seeded
recipeInstructions:
1. Cover the chipotle pepper with boiling water and soak for 10 minutes. Remove and finely chop the pepper.
2. Mix the chopped pepper with 2 tablespoons of olive oil.
3. Core the tomatoes and slice them into 1/2-inch thick pieces.
4. Place the tomato slices in the oil-chipotle mixture, turning to coat evenly.
5. In a large skillet, sauté the onion in the remaining 2 tablespoons olive oil until just softened.
6. Add the tomato slices and cook, stirring occasionally, until seared on both sides.
7. Add the garlic, the remaining chipotle sauce (1/4 teaspoon), salt, pepper, vinegar, and cilantro to the skillet. Cook for an additional minute.
8. Serve 5 or 6 slices per person.
Makes enough for: Reserve 1 cup for Mexican Spaghetti. Reserve 1 cup for Cold Roast Beef with Two Sauces.
